reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::step::reauth_confirm::title%]
reauth_confirm.description: Carrier needs your credentials refreshed. Enter your Carrier account username and password to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Carrier. Check your network connection and try again.
error.auth: Authentication failed. Check your Carrier username and password, then try again.
error.unknown: Carrier returned an unexpected response. Check the logs and try again.

data.infinite_holds: Holds are infinite, when off holds are until next scheduled activity
